rationale.regulatory-compliance: Proposes assurance cases to ensure LLM compliance with the EU AI Act.
rationale.org-governance: Supports organizational accountability, incident reporting, and auditability for stakeholders.
rationale.framework: Proposes a reference architecture using assurance cases for managing guardrails.
rationale.general-ai: Focuses on general LLM governance, not exclusively coding.
rationale.demote:context: The governance object is general AI, despite having a code example.
